title: elaphoglossum murinum
intro: Elaphoglossum murinum, also known as the moon fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum murinum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Elaphoglossum murinum are typically made from the leaves and stems of the plant, which can be used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures.
